---
title: "historic districts cleaning version 2 part 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
# Importing pre-cleaned data
historic_districts <- read_csv("../data/Historic Districts/historic_districts_clean3_specific_addresses.csv")
```
```{r}
# Removing unnecessary columns
# And making the address more human-readable
historic_districts <- historic_districts %>% 
  select(-nhl_designated_date, # 99% NA
         -prefix, # 85% NA
         -park_name, # 98% NA
         -level_of_significance_international # they were all false
         ) %>% 
  mutate(address = paste(property_name, city, state, sep = ", "))
```

## Widening

```{r}
# Split into binary (0 for false 1 for true) for the areas of significance
historic_districts <- historic_districts %>% 
  mutate(aos = area_of_significance) 

library(fastDummies)
widened_historic_districts <- dummy_cols(
    historic_districts,
    select_columns = "aos",
    split = "; "
  )
```

```{r}
widened_historic_districts <- widened_historic_districts %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  select(-aos)
```


## Fixing the duplicates
listed_date max
Lore Historic District = Lore, Seth And Irwinton Historic District (Boundary Increase)
Additional Documentation
li, lii
 parentheses
 match state, county, city
 
```{r}
historic_districts_parentheses <- widened_historic_districts %>% 
  filter(str_detect(property_name, "\\(Boundary") | str_detect(property_name, "\\(Additional")) %>% 
  mutate(cleaned_name = str_remove(property_name, " \\(.*")) %>% 
  distinct(cleaned_name)
```
```{r}
widened_historic_districts_nodupes <- widened_historic_districts

for(i in 1:nrow(historic_districts_parentheses)){
  temp_name_group <- widened_historic_districts_nodupes %>% 
    filter(str_detect(property_name, historic_districts_parentheses[[i, cleaned_name]]) &&
             state == historic_districts_parentheses[[i, state]] &&
             county == historic_districts_parentheses[[i, county]] &&
             city == historic_districts_parentheses[[i, city]]) %>% # ensuring that it's acc the same place
    select(-slice_max(listed_date)) # getting the most recent one
  
  widened_historic_districts_nodupes <- widened_historic_districts_nodupes %>% 
    select(-temp_name_group) # need to fix this maybe for look thru this thing???

}
  
  
  
  df_clean <- df %>% distinct(column_name, .keep_all = TRUE)

```


## Fixing the NA locations
```{r}
# Getting the simpler addresses + renaming these cols
```

```{r}

```
